title: LittleBuilders 2
description: A modpack for building with LittleTiles for 1.21.
body: The perfect modpack to build stuff with LittleTiles in 1.21.1. It is the official modpack by Team CREATIVE. It is used for building contests. **Mods included:** * CreativeCore * Fusion * Iris * LittleTiles * Lithium * Rechiseled * Sodium
